verse.name: v1
verse.lines: People Come together Strange as neighbours Our blood is one Children Of generations Of every nation Of kingdom come

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Don’t let your heart be troubled Hold your head up high Don’t fear no evil Fix your eyes on this one truth God is madly in love with you Take courage Hold on Be strong Remember where our help comes from

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Jesus Our redemption Our salvation Is in His blood Jesus Light of heaven Friend forever His kingdom come

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Swing wide All you heavens Let the praise go up As the walls come down All creation Everything with breath Repeat the sound All His children Clean hands Pure hearts Good grace Good God His Name is Jesus
